meaning: adj.省略一部分的,发音清楚的
examples: He clipped off a length of wire.
His second serve clipped the net.
She clipped the ball into the net.
Seguin was then clipped in the exchange by the stick of Rangers defenseman Steve Eminger.
However, Pompey were handed a reprieve as Fajardo's effort clipped the bar on its way over.
